nasb.text: But they did not listen or incline their ears to turn from their wickedness, so as not to burn sacrifices to other gods.

esv.text: But they did not listen or incline their ear, to turn from their evil and make no offerings to other gods.

cnv.text: 他們卻不聽從，毫不留心，不肯離開他們的惡行，仍向別神燒香。

ccb.text: 他们却毫不理会，不肯改掉向假神烧香的恶行。
